problem id: 64b20c19
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(3) OR NOT SHR(1)

examples:
  01100011 -> 11001110
  01110110 -> 11001110
  10110111 -> 10110110
  01010001 -> 11011111
  01111010 -> 11001111
  10100011 -> 10111110
  10000001 -> 10111111
  10111111 -> 10110111

query: 11011101
predicted answer: 10011011
